notes: Zendesk's own support/help center. Search-centric with category cards. Contact form accessible via Submit a Request. Sign In link for existing customers. Clean Zendesk Guide theme. Moderate DOM complexity — standard help center layout.

endpoints.label: Help Center Search
endpoints.description: Search bar for finding help articles and documentation

endpoints.label: Sign In
endpoints.description: Header Sign In link for authenticated support access

endpoints.label: Submit a Request
endpoints.description: Link to open a support ticket/request form

endpoints.label: Help Center Categories
endpoints.description: Category cards/links: Getting Started, Account Settings, Billing, Agent Guide, etc.

endpoints.label: Community Forum
endpoints.description: Link to Zendesk community/forum for peer discussions

endpoints.label: Contact Support
endpoints.description: Direct link or button to reach Zendesk support team (chat, phone, or form)
